description: Capability for every window the app can mint: the `main` window plus each runtime project window. Project windows are labelled `w{N}` by WindowRegistry (src-tauri/src/lib.rs, WINDOW_LABEL_PREFIX = "w"), so the `w*` glob below must stay in lockstep with that prefix. A label this list fails to match loses all IPC, and in release builds it fails SILENTLY. Labels are minted only by the registry counter; no user input (never a cwd) is interpolated into one.
